items.name_cn:
Top-tier original factory, complete packaging
🆕Boston Large 25cm✨
🔥This Dio.r Groove 25 handbag is a new arrival from the 2024 Winter Collection, designed by Maria Grazia Chiuri, elegant and stylish. Crafted from black calfskin with a quilted oversized houndstooth pattern, showcasing Dio.r's exquisite craftsmanship. The leather key charm features the Christian Dio.r Paris logo and is accented with gold-finished stars, unique and distinctive. The key charm opens the zip lock. The spacious compartment features a slip pocket and a zip pocket for daily essentials. Equipped with a leather top handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap, it can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody, making it an ideal handbag for daily looks.
Model:8810
Dimensions:25x 19x 16cm (L x H x W)

items.name_en: Top-tier original leather M15157 Avocado Green Mini Capucines series is named after the Paris street where Louis Vuitton opened its first store in 1854. This Capucines mini bag features a woven leather handle, tassel decoration, and a lock, highlighting the iconic elements of the Crafty series. The LV monogram features a jacquard effect, cleverly showcasing the brand's exquisite craftsmanship. Dimensions: 13.6 × 8 × 21 cm

items.name_en: Top-tier original leather M25466 Mini Crafty series once again imbues the Capucines mini bag with artisanal light. Taurillon cow leather shapes a classic silhouette, while the woven handle adds a sophisticated touch. The LV lettering displays a jacquard effect, and a detachable tassel hangs below the lock. Dimensions: 13.6 x 8 x 21 cm (H x W x D)

items.name_en: Top-tier original M11947 Yellow As a classic design, the Neverfull Bandouliere Inside Out Medium has no handles. This piece is crafted from Monogram canvas and striped fabric, featuring a double-sided design to showcase a trendy new look. The detachable shoulder strap makes it easy to carry crossbody, and it can also transform into a hobo bag via the side buckle. Dimensions: 31 × 28 × 14 cm
